LanguageData.TreeDesireDeannoyance_ZoneReplant_AllowR: When disabled, colonists will never replant in this zone. They will still harvest.
LanguageData.TreeDesireDeannoyance_ZoneReplant_AllowC: When disabled, colonists will never cut plants in this zone. They will still replant in spaces that are already empty, and harvest plants matching the zone filter.
LanguageData.TreeDesireDeannoyance_ZoneReplant_AllowH: When disabled, colonists will never harvest plants in this zone. They will still replant.\n\nCAUTION: When enabled, colonists will cut fully grown trees even if Always Extract Trees is turned on!
